meta.title: Mystery Garden House — Boutique Garden Guest House
meta.description: A mysterious yet welcoming escape in the heart of a misty lavender garden. Discover the secret of the garden.

hero.title: Mystery Garden House
hero.subtitle: Discover the Secret of the Garden

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: A Garden Hidden in the Mist
story.p1: Mystery Garden House is an escape where time slows down, in the middle of a lavender-scented garden at dusk. Every corner is thoughtfully designed, bringing together the peace of nature with elegant comfort.
story.p2: Wake up to birdsong in the morning, lose yourself in the garden paths during the day, and sip warm tea under the stars in the evening. Here, every guest discovers the garden's own secret.

rooms.label: Our Rooms
rooms.heading: Each One a Story
rooms.subheading: Thoughtfully designed stays in the embrace of nature.

pet.title: Pet Friendly
pet.desc: Your four-legged friends are welcome too

items.name: Elif & Can
items.text: The most peaceful place we have ever stayed. The breakfast in the garden was something else. We will definitely come back.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: A true hidden paradise. The scent of lavender, the warm welcome and the perfect details... Words fall short.

items.name: Mehmet Y.
items.text: The night we spent in the Treehouse Cabin was unforgettable. Waking up among the trees is an incredible experience.

ctaSection.heading: Ready to Live the Garden's Secret?
ctaSection.subheading: Book today and discover the magic of dusk.

footer.tagline: A mysterious yet welcoming escape in a misty lavender garden.
footer.newsletterDesc: For special offers and news from the garden.
footer.subscribed: Thank you! Your subscription is received.
footer.address: Bahce District, Lavanta Street No:7, Sirince, Izmir

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The story of a garden, a house, and countless moments.
about.philosophyP1: Mystery Garden House was founded with a respectful, sustainable and simple approach to nature. Every plant in our garden was planted by hand, every stone carefully placed.
about.philosophyP2: Our goal is to offer our guests not just a stay, but a space where they can reconnect with nature, rest, and rediscover themselves.
about.hostBio: I have been the keeper of this garden for ten years. When I left city life behind and returned to nature, I imagined this house as a sanctuary. Today, I am delighted to share this secret with you.
about.locationDesc: On the calm hills of Sirince, nestled within nature.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Moments from the garden, the rooms and the details.
